summary: The diff implements a comprehensive rebuild of the public-facing frontend matching Version 3 design, preserves the post-Version-7 footer, and maintains the backend. The vast majority of requirements are implemented. The primary concern is the Navbar logo path: the requirement specifies 'frontend/public/assets/generated/inside-pet-tech-logo.png' but the Navbar and Footer both reference '/assets/generated/inside-pet-tech-logo.dim_400x480.png' (a dimensioned variant). Additionally, the backend claimInitialAdmin appears to lack a no-op guard when admins already exist, seeded sample articles are not visible in the truncated backend diff, and some endpoint names differ from the spec.

missing_requirements.requirement: Navbar logo must use frontend/public/assets/generated/inside-pet-tech-logo.png exactly as specified in the constraint
missing_requirements.reason: The Navbar and Footer reference '/assets/generated/inside-pet-tech-logo.dim_400x480.png' rather than the exact filename 'inside-pet-tech-logo.png' specified in the build request constraint.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend must expose addAdmin, removeAdmin, isAdmin with those exact names; claimInitialAdmin must be a no-op once at least one admin exists; seeded sample articles must exist
missing_requirements.reason: The backend shows addAdminPrincipal/removeAdminPrincipal instead of addAdmin/removeAdmin; claimInitialAdmin calls AccessControl.initialize unconditionally with no guard for existing admins; no seeded sample articles are visible in the truncated diff.

hallucinated_features.description: getUserProfile(user: Principal) endpoint exposed publicly on the backend
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec only requires saveCallerUserProfile and getCallerUserProfile. A separate getUserProfile function allowing lookup of any user by principal was added but not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: ProfileSetupModal component for first-time login profile setup
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a profile setup modal or first-time login onboarding flow. This is an extra feature beyond what was requested.
